title: rosa canina var. spinulifolia
intro: Rosa canina var. spinulifolia, also known as the spiny-leaved dog rose, is a variety of the dog rose plant, characterized by its spiny stems and leaves. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly in vitamins C and E, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. spinulifolia include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are commonly used to treat conditions such as digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and skin irritations.
